skills.name: bnbchain skills
skills.description: A skill for building on BNBChain - covers EVM interactions, smart contracts, tokens, NFTs, wallet operations, ERC-8004 agent tools, and Greenfield storage. Use it when developing or querying BNB Smart Chain and opBNB infrastructure via the BNB Chain MCP.

skills.name: Myriad Markets Skills
skills.description: Use the Myriad CLI to trade prediction markets on Myriad Markets

skills.name: QLWY Fortune Casting
skills.description: On-chain I Ching divination (链上算卦) powered by Binance Oracle VRF. Cast hexagrams, mint NFT fortunes, and get AI-powered readings via BAP-578 agent protocol.

skills.name: Vibers Code Review
skills.description: Human code review for AI-generated projects. Checks spec compliance, security (OWASP top 10), AI hallucinations, and submits PRs with fixes.

skills.name: BNB Skill Creator
skills.description: Help a beginner create a Codex/Claude skill, publish it in a public GitHub repository, and submit a valid metadata pull request to bnb-chain/skills-hub. Use this whenever the user wants to create a new skill for BNB Chain Skills Hub, submit a skill to skills-hub, prepare a metadata JSON, or needs end-to-end help with GitHub, forks, branches, commits, and pull requests.
